const API_BASE='/api';export const backupApi={// Get backup status
getStatus:async()=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/backup/status"));if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch backup status');return response.json();},// Create backup
createBackup:async function(){let target=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'primary';const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/backup/run?target=").concat(target),{method:'POST'});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to create backup');return response.json();},// Check integrity
checkIntegrity:async()=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/backup/integrity"),{method:'POST'});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to check integrity');return response.json();},// Recover from backup
recover:async function(){let source=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'primary';const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/backup/recover?source=").concat(source),{method:'POST'});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to recover from backup');return response.json();}};
